steps.title: Spot the key contrast
steps.content: The prompt asks the student to emphasize a DIFFERENCE. The notes reveal a clear contrast: Uros Island uses smooth multicolored LED domes, while Golden Connection uses entangled blue and white LED tubes.

steps.title: Find the choice with explicit contrast language
steps.content: Choice A employs “but” and “stand in contrast to” to directly position smooth domes against tangled tubes. Choices B and D mention both works but lack explicit contrast language, while C addresses only one. That matches choice A — A is correct.
